from source import find_in_sorted

def test_find_in_sorted_last_element():
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    x = 7
    assert find_in_sorted(arr, x) == len(arr) - 1, f"Expected index {len(arr) - 1} for target {x} in {arr}, but got {find_in_sorted(arr, x)}"

    with pytest.raises(RecursionError):
